---
name: Mod Suggestion / Feature Request
about: Suggest a mod or improvement for the pack
title: "[SUGGESTION] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you suggesting?**
A clear description of the mod or feature.

**Mod link (if applicable)**
Modrinth or CurseForge URL

**Why does it fit the pack?**
How does it complement the Create: Aeronautics theme?

**Known conflicts or concerns**
Any mods it might clash with?
